title: What will you work on when Fable 5 comes back online today?
abstract:
Saw this last night: https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/2072163884430229756

I'm taking the weekend off to spend time with my lady, so got up early today to start preparing to get back to work on a sailboat simulator I started building when Fable was pulled. It simulates
abstract_zh:
昨晚看到这个了：https://x.com/AnthropicAI/status/2072163884430229756  
本来周末要和女朋友约会，结果一大早就跑到甲板上，开始调试那个被迫中断的Fable 5模拟器。这可比去海边吹海风刺激多了！
